positive: A central, intricate mandala design featuring stylized celestial animals, vibrant mythological beasts, and cosmic geometric patterns. The primary colors are deep sapphire blue, iridescent gold, emerald green, and touch of magenta. The composition is perfectly circular, designed to be a symmetrical, all-over print. Use linework reminiscent of neo-traditional etching mixed with bioluminescent watercolor gradients. The subject must evoke cosmic wonder and intricate detail, suitable for a repeating pattern repeat. High contrast, clean lines, vector-like sharpness, stylized illustration, centered composition, occult, esoteric, tapestry print quality, graphic novel style, UHD.
negative: blur, smudges, text, signature, watermark, logo, low resolution, noisy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, asymmetrical, gradient texture, photo, realistic, out of frame
